action.reasoning: Observation: Resume from best_v2.pt failed because train.py auto-detected encoding as 'embedding' when the checkpoint uses 'linear' encoding. The auto-detection logic in train.py (which is truncated) is broken. Time remaining: ~43 min. Analysis: Need to (1) diagnose what's actually in best_v2.pt, (2) fix train.py to correctly resume the linear model, (3) train more epochs. The linear model (val AP 0.2266, test AP 0.2136) was still improving at epoch 60. Decision: Quick diagnostic on checkpoint, then write fixed train.py with explicit linear encoding and correct resume, train 30+ epochs.
action.command: python -c "import torch; ckpt=torch.load('checkpoints/best_v2.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False); print('Keys:', [k for k in ckpt.keys() if k != 'model_state_dict']); sd=ckpt['model_state_dict']; print('Model keys:', list(sd.keys())[:20]); print('Encoding:', ckpt.get('encoding_type','NOT SAVED')); print('Hidden dim:', ckpt.get('hidden_dim','NOT SAVED')); print('Num layers:', ckpt.get('num_layers','NOT SAVED')); [print(f'  {k}: {v.shape}') for k,v in list(sd.items())[:10]]"
